page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores using the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.g7t.16xlarge demonstrates strong multi-core processing capabilities. Multi-core performance tests, including stress-ng multi-core CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU scores, place this instance in the top 25% tier. It also exhibits strong performance in specialized tasks such as software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, image processing, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Single-core performance, single-threaded compression, and memory bandwidth (both read and write) perform within the average range. Database operations and static web serving throughput are also highly rated, landing in the top 25% tier.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and strong multi-core capabilities, this instance is well-suited for multi-threaded workloads, including database operations, static web serving, software compilation pipelines, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks. However, the lack of local NVMe storage requires external storage solutions, which may introduce latency tradeoffs depending on the network configuration. The absence of GPU acceleration limits its utility for large-scale deep learning training, though it handles small-to-medium model inference efficiently.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Benchmark data shows strong multi-core performance, placing it in the top 25% for multi-threaded CPU tasks, software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations. Conversely, single-core performance and memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, database management, and medium-scale language model inference, offering a balanced compute-to-memory ratio for enterprise workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps bandwidth for multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
tagline: A balanced 64-core dedicated compute platform with strong multi-threaded performance and high network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.7 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 core-to-RAM ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong multi-core CPU, software compilation, and database performance
Optimal for multi-threaded applications, web serving, and medium LLM inference
